calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 289842. Lillian Ng appearing for and with petitioner Kingston Hom. William Wong appearing for and with surviving spouse Lai chung Ng Hom. Court will issue an order consolidating these two cases to the lower number. Mr. Wong wanted to do further discovery before filing Will Contest. He will amend his spousal property petition to include the wife's 38 years contribution to the real property. Ms. Ng objected to the continuance of her petition for probate. Court is appointing Kingston Hom as the executor with limited authority. Bond is fixed in the amount of $250,000.00. Mr. Wong objected to the appointment and he wanted to have the Public Administrator appointed. It appeared to the Court that he is objecting to the conservatorship. Ms. Ng will file the final account in the conservatorship. Mr. Wong can object to the conservator's final account. Order appointing executor with limited authority with Bond fixed in the amount of $250,000.00 signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Tony Santiago.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Continued To Jun-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Continued To Jun-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: William Wong appearing for wife of 38 years to object to petition for probate of will. He has filed a spousal property petition in case number 289842. He thought the court was going to consolidate the two cases. The spousal property petition is set for hearing on 5/29. He wants to continue his petition to the same date as the petition for probate of will. The petition for probate of will is continued to 6/4. Mr. Wong can request to have his petition continued to the same date. Mr. Wong objected to the conservatorship not close. That issue is not before the court. Court will issue order on consolidation.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Continued To May-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
